## Problem

<!-- What problem are you trying to solve? Why does the current framework make this awkward, error-prone, or impossible? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would you like KernDX to do? A new class? A new API on an existing class? A configuration option? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What workarounds have you tried? What other framework patterns or libraries solve this differently? -->

## Adoption impact

<!-- Would this be a backwards-compatible addition, or would existing subscribers need to migrate? -->

- [ ] Backwards-compatible
- [ ] Requires migration (please explain)

## Use case

<!-- Walk us through a concrete scenario: an actual Apex / LWC code path where you would use this feature. -->

```apex
// How you would use the proposed feature:

```

## Additional context

<!-- Links to similar features in other frameworks, related issues, etc. -->
